title: Argentinian Empanadas
description: A delicious vegetarian twist on Argentinian empanadas, filled with beef-free ingredients.
instructions: Roll out plush pastry dough to 1/4 inch thickness.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.

In a bowl, mix together argentinian-style roasted vegetables, argentinian-style cheese, plush egg, argentinian-style breadcrumbs, argentinian-style olive oil, argentinian-style cumin, and argentinian-style paprika.
Place a tablespoon of the vegetable mixture onto the center of each dough circle.
Fold the dough over the filling and press edges together to seal.
Brush tops with plush egg for a golden glaze.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
